profile.silhouette: horse body whose forward withers transition directly into an upright humanoid torso

bounds.source: bind hierarchy plus opaque plate envelopes

geometry.closure: every member and connector is a closed opaque shape; connector gaskets bridge continuous core masses

compositingPolicy.sortWithinGroup: camera-relative depth, far-to-near, then stable ID
compositingPolicy.bilateralSwap: absolute left/right plates are assigned near/far from projected camera depth at each heading

projectionRecipe.tokenFit: multiply by tokenUnitsPerMeter and offset by tokenGroundPoint
projectionRecipe.occlusion: semantic group first, camera depth second

checks.detail: joint, plate, gasket, anchor, and paint IDs
all joints have roles and valid parents
declared mirrors resolve
all plates are opaque and role-colored
custom paths end closed
every plate attaches to valid joints
closed opaque core covers continuous masses
connected visible joints use gaskets or declared overlap
anchors include orientation and scale behavior
contact joints are explicitly labeled
canonical clips are present
keyframes and contacts are normalized
eight headings and four validation elevations
far LOD preserves identity and contacts
dedicated core occluder includes closed torso, pelvis, chest, neck, and head connector gaskets
every exported local animation transform targets a joint in this package
every membrane and joint polygon resolves entirely within this package
attack frames use joint rotations without child-joint translation, preserving bind bone lengths
1 clip(s) declaring preserve keep every parent-child distance fixed across nine samples
0 under-core plate/gasket records are fixed behind the opaque core

validation.acceptance: background is permitted only outside the closed opaque silhouette or inside explicitly declared intentional holes

directionalChecks.detail: 2304 projections cover bind plus every clip across nine normalized times
projected core occluder has a closed hull in every required view
active contact surfaces remain on Z=0 within 0.12m authoring tolerance
all six ordered compositing groups are emitted
clean asset markup contains no transparency, filters, masks, or gradients
absolute left/right appendages exchange camera-near and camera-far groups when heading reverses

solverRecipe.easing: clip-level easing applied between normalized keyframes
solverRecipe.ik: optional authoring metadata; directional bake may solve then bake transforms

attachmentContract.geometry: opaque rigid plates or closed custom paths

acceptanceCondition: At every required heading, elevation, and key pose the creature compiles to one closed opaque silhouette; background is allowed only outside it or inside an explicitly declared intentional hole.
